**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Desktop/Laptop** (please complete to the best of your knowledge)
 - OS: [e.g. iOS, macOS, Windows]
 - Browser [e.g. chrome, safari]
 - Browser Version  [e.g. 22]

**Tablet** (If you are using a tablet, please include the model and screen size  [e.g. iPad Pro 6th Gen 12 in]): 

**Smartphone**:
- Model [e.g. iPhone 17 Pro Max]
- Browser [e.g. stock browser, Safari] 

> Facet works best on desktops/laptops. Support for smartphones is limited (read-only). 

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
